narrative:
Wooster City has 16,896 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.3%, a clear Republican lean of 9.8 percentage points.
